summary: Add Codex repair adapter and real codebase fixture
description: Add a first-class Codex repair adapter command builder and replace toy answer.txt proof with a mini package failing-test repair fixture that exercises real code edits.
acceptance: CLI can emit/use a Codex repair adapter command from task JSON and verification failure context.
A mini Python package fixture is repaired by go-loop without user intervention.

evidence.summary: Added --repair-agent codex/hermes adapter option and real mini Python package repair fixture. go-loop now proves failing pytest package repair without user intervention, beyond toy answer.txt. Verification: pytest -q 16 passed; make check passed.
